title: Smokey Apple Wrap
description: A sweet and savory wrap filled with smoky flavors and crunchy apple.
instructions: Preheat a pan or griddle over medium heat.
Warm the tortilla for 30 seconds on each side.
Spread the hummus evenly over the tortilla, leaving a 1-inch border.
Arrange the chopped apples on one half of the tortilla.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro over the apples.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the filling is heated through.
Cut in half and serve immediately.
